subcodes.first_line: Glory be unto Thee, O Thou Who art my God, my Master, my Support, my Beloved, my Aim, and Who art the Aspiration of them that have drawn nigh unto Thee!
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحانک یا الهی و سیدی و سندی و محبوبی و مقصودی و مقصود المقربین اسئلک باسمک
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for spiritual recognition, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @prayer for nearness to God, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
